Bash(node -e "const https = require\('https'\); https.get\('https://cloudflare.com', r => console.log\('HTTP OK:', r.statusCode\)\).on\('error', e => console.log\('No net:', e.message\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const https = require\('https'\); const req = https.get\('https://cloudflare.com', r => { console.log\('HTTP OK:', r.statusCode\); process.exit\(0\); }\); req.on\('error', e => { console.log\('No net:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { console.log\('timeout'\); process.exit\(1\); }, 5000\);")
